recommendations.title: Heli
recommendations.overview: Heli must try and protect his young family when his 12-year-old sister inadvertently involves them in the brutal drug world. He must battle against the drug cartel that have been angered as well as the corrupt police force.

recommendations.title: Death Wish 4: The Crackdown
recommendations.overview: After the death of his girlfriend's daughter from a drug overdose, Paul Kersey takes on the local drug cartel.

recommendations.title: Gangsta
recommendations.overview: Antwerp, Belgium. The lives of four small-time drug dealers spin out of control when they steal a shipment of cocaine, triggering a full out war between an Amsterdam drug lord and a ruthless Colombian cartel.

recommendations.title: Pusher
recommendations.overview: A drug pusher grows increasingly desperate after a botched deal leaves him with a large debt to a ruthless drug lord.

recommendations.title: Savages
recommendations.overview: Pot growers Ben and Chon face off against the Mexican drug cartel who kidnapped their shared girlfriend.

recommendations.title: A Score to Settle
recommendations.overview: A former mob enforcer who is released from prison after serving 22 years for a crime he didn't commit sets out on a path for revenge against the people who wronged him.

recommendations.title: Gunpowder Milkshake
recommendations.overview: To protect an 8-year-old girl, a dangerous assassin reunites with her mother and her lethal associates to take down a ruthless crime syndicate and its army of henchmen.

recommendations.title: Fast Convoy
recommendations.overview: Málaga, southern Spain. Seven men, divided into four cars, set off with a large drug shipment towards Creil, a city near Paris; a routine mission that will be complicated by a fatal sequence of events.

recommendations.title: Snowden
recommendations.overview: CIA employee Edward Snowden leaks thousands of classified documents to the press.

recommendations.title: Leo
recommendations.overview: Parthiban, a cafe owner, lives with his family in Himachal Pradesh. Things take an absurd turn for him when he gets in the way of a drug cartel.
